etymology.description: 中(中) (zhōng, "middle; central") + 國(國) (guó, "country; nation") = 中國 refers to the central or middle kingdom, which is how China traditionally saw itself in relation to neighboring regions.
etymology.interpretation: 中(中) (zhōng, "middle; central") suggests being at the center. 國(國) (guó, "country; nation") refers to a state or territory. The combination 中國 originally signified the 'central country,' reflecting the cultural belief of being the center of civilization. Over time, this evolved into the name for the nation of China.

examples.chinese: 中国(中國)是世界上人口最多的国家(是世界上人口最多的國家)。
examples.pinyin: Zhōngguó shì shìjiè shàng rénkǒu zuì duō de guójiā.
examples.english: China is the most populous country in the world.

examples.chinese: 我计划明年去中国旅行(我計劃明年去中國旅行)。
examples.pinyin: Wǒ jìhuà míngnián qù zhōngguó lǚxíng.
examples.english: I plan to travel to China next year.

examples.chinese: 中国古代文化(中國古代文化)非常丰富(非常豐富)，吸引了很多学者(吸引了很多學者)来研究(來研究)。
examples.pinyin: Zhōngguó gǔdài wénhuà fēicháng fēngfù, xīyǐnle hěn duō xuézhě lái yánjiū.
examples.english: Ancient Chinese culture is very rich and has attracted many scholars to study it.
